title: Hornet Removal in Washington Heights, Manhattan | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Washington Heights, Manhattan. Safe elimination of hornet nests from homes and buildings. Call Best Pest Control NYC today for fast service!
intro: Washington Heights residents face unique hornet challenges due to the neighborhood's mix of pre-war apartment buildings, tree-lined streets, and proximity to Fort Tryon Park. Our professional hornet removal services protect families and properties throughout this vibrant Manhattan community. Best Pest Control NYC offers safe, effective hornet nest elimination with pricing between $350 and $550.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in Washington Heights' diverse building types, from the historic walk-ups near Broadway to modern high-rises along the Hudson River. Our licensed technicians understand the area's specific pest pressures and provide same-day emergency hornet removal services throughout the neighborhood.
localContext: Washington Heights' abundant green spaces, including Fort Tryon Park and Highbridge Park, combined with the neighborhood's older residential architecture, create ideal conditions for hornet nesting. The area's multi-family buildings and numerous eaves, overhangs, and fire escapes often provide sheltered spots where hornets establish colonies during warmer months.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Washington Heights?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency hornet removal services throughout Washington Heights. Most residential hornet nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, depending on nest location and size. We serve all areas from Hudson Heights to Sugar Hill and can typically reach your property within 60-90 minutes of your call.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal price?
faqs.answer: Our pricing includes a thorough property inspection, complete nest removal, treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation, and safe disposal of the nest. The final cost depends on nest size, location accessibility, and height (roof-level nests may require additional equipment). We provide upfront pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: Are hornets common in Washington Heights buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, hornets frequently nest in Washington Heights due to the neighborhood's mature trees, parks, and older buildings with numerous entry points. Common nesting sites include building eaves, fire escapes, attic spaces, and overhangs on pre-war apartment buildings. Peak hornet activity occurs from late spring through early fall.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for apartment buildings and families?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols designed for multi-family buildings. We coordinate with building management when necessary and ensure all residents, children, and pets are kept at a safe distance during removal. Our methods eliminate hornets while minimizing environmental impact.
